summary: Operators of the "Rubicon" Center conducted combat operations on March 4, 2026, in the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions, targeting Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and a 2S1 "Gvozdika" self-propelled artillery system, with 103 targets destroyed. Ukrainian forces are using the Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system, costing 3-5 thousand hryvnias, to enhance FPV drone and video interceptor capabilities. Efforts to locate and destroy REO, RER, and UAV control stations focus on identifying antennas, with the enemy employing plastic mesh-based designs to conceal them. An FPV drone narrowly missed a Russian Mi-8 helicopter in a close call.
